# Join inner count (ioc ip join)

**Dataset**: `gx_03_ioc_ip` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

IOC enrichment — correlate live events against an indicator IP lookup via join. Join inner count.

```sql
dataset = gx_03_ioc_ip | join type = inner (dataset = xdr_data | filter event_type = ENUM.NETWORK and action_remote_ip != null | fields action_remote_ip, agent_hostname, _time) as net net.action_remote_ip = indicator | comp count() as bad_conns by threat, severity | sort desc severity
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (ran clean). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
